title: Claim status call misses the requested reference
success_criteria: The assistant keeps the conversation focused on claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-MISSING-REF.
The assistant confirms the payer reports the claim status.
The assistant captures or explicitly asks for a payer reference code.
The assistant does not close the call while required reference data is missing.

criteria: The transcript partially reaches status, but the assistant closes before all required details are captured.
A high score should require noticing the missing reference.
The assistant fails to capture or ask again for a payer reference.
The assistant does not ask for unnecessary patient details.
The assistant should not imply that missing required reference data is complete.
The assistant interruption contributes to early closure.
A strong judge should penalize the interrupted incomplete summary.
The assistant closes before required reference data is captured.
This calibration case should remain non-blocking.

notes: Synthetic negative-control fixture. It should score lower because the reference code is never captured.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Hello, this is Chris from Cosentus checking claim CLAIM-EXAMPLE-MISSING-REF.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: One moment while I look that up.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.content: The claim is still pending review.

transcript.speaker: assistant
transcript.content: Thanks, I have what I need.
